---
name: zoom-out
description: Step back from local code details and explain system-level context, tradeoffs, and direction. Use when users need a higher-level view.
---

# zoom-out

## Workflow

1. Summarize local component purpose.
2. Relate it to system boundaries and adjacent components.
3. Call out design tradeoffs and future risks.
4. Suggest next investigations or simplifications.

## References

Read `README.md`, `GOVERNANCE.md`, and relevant entries in `docs/decisions/`.
